strengths: Proven fullstack proficiency in TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple production systems, directly matching core required skills.
Demonstrated experience integrating diverse data systems (CRM-like mail platforms, GIS data, real-time metadata) and building scalable APIs, aligning with platform integration responsibilities.
Strong track record of owning end-to-end systems—from backend services to UIs and DevOps tooling—showing the ownership and systems thinking the role demands.
concerns: Current role at re:cinq (April 2025–present) is listed as future-dated, raising questions about timeline accuracy or role clarity.
German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' while high on-site presence in Berlin is required, potentially impacting daily collaboration.
Experience with PostgreSQL is implied but not explicitly stated; primary database exposure is MongoDB and MySQL.

key_factors.factor: Systems integration and data workflow experience

response.justification: Bogdan brings deep, demonstrable fullstack expertise in TypeScript, React, and Node.js across complex, production-grade systems—including CRM integrations, real-time data platforms, and scalable APIs—directly aligning with the role’s core responsibilities. His history of owning end-to-end systems, from UI to infrastructure, and his proven ability to learn and adapt across stacks and domains make him a strong candidate despite minor concerns around language proficiency and database specificity.
